alkylation reagent: 80 mM CAA was added to the mucus
alkylation concentration: 80 mM CAA was added to the mucus
cleavage agent: Trypsin and LysC were added at 1:50 (enzyme:substrate)
collision energy: with collision energy varying from 25 to 120 eV
enrichment method: enriched on a 50 mg Hypercarb SPE cartridge
fractionation method: size exclusion chromatography with a mass cut-off of 600 kDa
instrument: TIM-MS and TIM-MS/MS were performed on a timsTOF Pro spectrometer
ionization type: equipped with an in-house 3D-printed offline nano-ESI source
reduction reagent: 20 mM DTT, 80 mM CAA was added to the mucus
reduction concentration: 20 mM DTT, 80 mM CAA was added to the mucus
